settings.tagline: 5 metres of freedom. One thumb to stop them.

settings.title: Product Specifications
settings.value_2: Nylon traction rope with 3M reflective coating

settings.title: How to Use the Brake & Lock
settings.content:
Brake: Press thumb button to slow or stop instantly. Lock: Flick side switch while brake is pressed to hold at fixed length hands-free. Release: Press brake + release switch simultaneously.

Always use brake lock near roads. Not a replacement for training.

settings.title: Shipping & Returns
settings.content:
Free worldwide shipping on all orders. Express available at checkout.

Free 30-day returns on all non-personalised items. Items must be unworn and in original packaging.

settings.title: Care
settings.content: Retract cord fully after every walk to prevent tangling. Wipe housing with damp cloth. Do not submerge in water. Check cord integrity monthly — replace if frayed.

settings.name: Tangle-Free Cord
settings.description: Smooth retraction mechanism keeps cord flowing freely. No knotting, no jamming.

settings.name: Brake + Lock
settings.description: Instant thumb brake for hazards. Side lock holds at fixed length hands-free.

settings.name: 50kg Rated
settings.description: Nylon rope rated to 50kg tensile load. Handles the strongest pullers safely.

settings.text: I've never seen my dog get this excited. The quality feels incredible — super durable and looks beautiful. It's rare to find pet products that are both functional and this stylish. PAWD nailed it.
settings.author: Olivia M.

settings.text: The personalised collar is the prettiest I've ever seen. The stitching, the softness, the engraving — all of it feels so intentional. Worth every cent and more.
settings.author: Jack L.
